production_principle: verification before activation; no deploy/merge/mutation without explicit approval
verdict_reason: Phases 1-3 complete and VERIFIED on main except two gates fixed in open PR #336 (not yet merged). Phases 4-11 are BLOCKED pending owner-provisioned secrets and explicit production approval. No live evidence exists, so READY is not permissible.

phases.name: Governance
phases.evidence: docs/launch-evidence/LAUNCH-GOVERNANCE.md authored; ADR-0001 + Q8 policy present

phases.name: Secrets
phases.evidence: secrets-manifest.json + check-secrets-manifest.py; --all exit=1 fail-closed, all 6 required UNSET (expected, names only)

phases.name: Local gates
phases.evidence: npm run check exit=0 (8/0); npm test exit=0; npm run build exit=0; .agents/validate.py exit=0; py_compile exit=0; commander gates PASS except qala-egress (fixed in #336); pytest collection blocked on main (fixed in #336)

phases.name: Modal deploy
phases.evidence: Prepared: workflow_dispatch modal-deploy.yml confirm=DEPLOY_MODAL, environment=production. Requires MODAL_TOKEN_ID/SECRET + approval. Not executed.

phases.name: Modal CLI smoke
phases.evidence: Depends on Phase 4. scripts/commander/modal-runtime-smoke.sh + smoke-modal.yml available.

phases.name: Bayyinah PR gate
phases.evidence: agent-review.yml runs on pull_request; exits UNVERIFIED (non-approving) when secrets absent. Merge-blocking depends on branch protection (UNVERIFIED from repo files).

phases.name: Control boundary
phases.evidence: PolicyService/AuditService + sovereignCyberRadar present; live boundary tests require running runtime.

phases.name: Device/connectivity pilot
phases.evidence: Requires Phases 4-8 green + allowlisted device + manual operator.

phases.name: Limited live
phases.evidence: Requires rate limits, monitoring, rollback, error budget, audit export.

phases.name: Full live
phases.evidence: Requires all gates green + no CRITICAL/HIGH + stable endpoint smoke + verified incident path.

local_gate_results.label: BLOCKED
local_gate_results.detail: router.huggingface.co unapproved on main; fixed in PR #336

local_gate_results.label: BLOCKED
local_gate_results.detail: fastapi import collection error on main; fixed in PR #336 via importorskip

deploy_trigger_audit.gated: deploy job requires workflow_dispatch && confirm==ACTIVATE; push/schedule reach smoke-only job
deploy_trigger_audit.label: VERIFIED

blockers.desc: aegis-verify red on main: pytest collection error + qala-egress finding

blockers.remediation: provision in GitHub Actions / secret manager
